footer.tagline: Modern transport platform for carriers, shippers and brokers across Europe.

home.title: Modern Freight Exchange
home.subtitle: Connecting carriers, shippers and brokers across Europe

about.title: About facturamea
about.intro: facturamea is a modern freight exchange built for professionals who want a fast, transparent and easy-to-use platform. We connect carriers, shippers and brokers across Europe with tools designed for real-world workflows.
about.for_carriers_text: Find freight quickly on your route, place bids in auctions and manage your fleet from a single place.
about.for_shippers_text: Post freight, get transparent offers and quickly assign the best carrier for your route.
about.for_brokers_text: Operate as both shipper and carrier. Sub-users, custom clauses and flexible plans.
about.mission_text: We want the transport market in Romania and Europe to work better: less bureaucracy, fewer phone calls, fewer uncertainties. We build modern tools that save time and bring transparency — orders with clear status flow, two-way ratings, an incidents system with right of reply.
about.team_text: facturamea is built by a small group of engineers and transport professionals who want a platform they would use themselves. We focus on fast iteration, direct user feedback and simple solutions that work.
about.cta_subtitle: Sign up in 2 minutes. No card, no commitment.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We're here to help — we reply within 24h on business days.
contact.form_success: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.

items.q: How do I create an account?
items.a: Click "Sign up free" → fill in your personal details (name, email, phone, password) → fill in your company details (name, VAT/CUI) → confirm your email. The whole process takes ~2 minutes.
Carrier (searches freight, offers trucks, bids on auctions), Broker (searches and offers, hybrid), Direct Client (posts freight, organises auctions), Partner (special role for platform partners).

items.q: Can I have multiple users under the same company?
items.a: Yes. From Settings → Sub-users, the main account can add team members with their own permissions. Limits depend on the subscription plan.

items.q: How do I reset my password?
items.a: On the Sign in page there's a "Forgot password" link. You'll receive an email with a reset link valid for 1 hour.
Only Direct Client and Broker accounts can publish freight listings. Carriers search freight and respond to offers.
We have a database of 9,631 European cities from GeoNames. Start typing 2+ letters and the system quickly suggests locations with country and postal code.

items.q: Can I edit a listing after I've posted it?
items.a: Yes, only the original poster can modify the listing. Once assigned to a carrier, it becomes an order and can only be updated via status changes.

A request for offers with a fixed deadline. You post the freight, set a starting price (max accepted), an optional reserve price (below which you won't award), and a closing date. Carriers place bids under the starting price. At close, you pick the winner (manually or automatically — the lowest bid).
Yes, anytime before the auction closes, if your bid hasn't already been declared the winner.

items.q: What happens after I win an auction?
items.a: The system automatically creates an order with a unique ID (CMD-2026-XXXXX) and connects you with the shipper for loading. The other participants' bids are automatically marked as rejected.
Open → Accepted → Loaded → Delivered → Closed. At each stage, both parties receive a notification. On close, both parties rate each other.
Payment happens directly between parties, according to agreed clauses. facturamea doesn't currently broker financial transactions.

items.q: Can I report a payment delay?
items.a: Yes, via the Incidents section. The "Payment delay" category creates a two-way report, and the other party has right of reply.

items.q: How does the incident system work?
items.a: You can file a report against a company (category: damaged cargo, late delivery, no show, payment delay, fraud, etc.). The other party can reply. Incidents become public only after admin approval.
From Settings → Blacklist you can block a company. Their listings won't show up in your results and they won't be able to bid on your auctions.
Yes, GDPR-compliant. Read the details in the Privacy Policy.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Your resources for getting the most out of facturamea.
support.faq_card_text: Answers to the most common questions — account, freight, auctions, orders, incidents.
support.email_card_text: For technical questions or account issues:
support.form_card_text: Send us a structured message and we'll reply within 24h on business days.
support.urgent_title: Urgent issue with an active order?
support.urgent_text: For incidents related to an ongoing order use our in-app Incidents system. Reports are two-way and allow right of reply.
support.urgent_link: Sign in and open a report →

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.text: facturamea uses cookies that are strictly necessary for the platform to work (authentication, sessions). We don't use advertising tracking cookies.

landing.meta_description: Romania's first freight exchange built for real balance between carriers and shippers. Reliability and transparency become the standard.
landing.hero_desc_1: is the platform where reliability and transparency become the standard — not the exception.
landing.hero_desc_2: We're not just another freight exchange. We're Romania's first platform where behavior matters.
landing.hero_desc_3: is the first exchange built for real balance between carriers and shippers.
landing.problem_headline: The industry's problems aren't exceptions. They're systemic.
landing.problem_intro: If you work in transport, you already know the reality:
landing.problem_1: Invoices paid late or ignored entirely
landing.problem_2: Hours and days lost at the loading dock without compensation
landing.problem_3: Trips cancelled at the last minute with no consequences
landing.problem_4: A total lack of transparency between partners
landing.problem_conclusion_b: It's the result of a system that doesn't penalize bad behavior.
landing.solution_headline: We're building a system where behavior matters.
landing.solution_sub_1: Every interaction becomes visible. Every action has consequences.
landing.solution_sub_2_a: is an industry initiative for the industry. Backed by
landing.solution_sub_2_b: and built together with carriers who want more from this market.
landing.solution_block_1_a: Our goal isn't just to connect supply with demand.
landing.solution_block_1_b: Our goal is to create a fair trading environment.
landing.solution_block_2: We're building Romania's first freight exchange focused on real balance and accountability between all parties involved.
landing.feature_1_text_1: Carriers can rate clients and intermediaries based on payment behavior.
landing.feature_1_text_2: Payment incidents or delays are visible on the platform. The processing fee is borne by the company that caused the incident.
landing.feature_1_result: Result: we discourage late payments and reward paying on time.
landing.feature_2_text_1: Carriers can rate real loading and unloading times.
landing.feature_2_text_2: See in advance who you're working with and what to expect.
landing.feature_2_result: Your time becomes a visible factor, not a hidden loss.
landing.feature_3_text_1: Carriers rate clients. Clients rate carriers.
landing.feature_3_result: A system built on real reputation.
landing.feature_4_text: Clients can track shipments in real time directly from the platform. Live map, automatic status updates, and notifications at every stage — from loading to delivery.
landing.feature_4_result: Fewer phone calls. More control. More trust.
landing.benefits_punch: You no longer work on blind trust. You work on real information.
landing.community_text_b: and developed together with carriers and industry professionals. It's more than a platform.
landing.community_text_c: It's a step toward a more professional way of doing transport.
landing.cta_final_text: Early access for carriers, freight forwarders, direct clients, and partners selling services and equipment to the transport industry.
landing.faq_1_a: Access will be free for carriers. There will be a subscription for clients and freight forwarders.
landing.faq_2_a: We estimate the first version will be available in mid-May to early June.
landing.faq_3_a: Carriers, freight forwarders, direct clients, and partners selling services and equipment to the transport industry.
landing.faq_4_a: Rating systems will be monitored and cross-checked with real platform activity.
landing.final_text_1: Transport doesn't have to be a permanent compromise.
landing.final_text_2: It's time to work in a system where reliability matters.
landing.contact_text: Whether you're a carrier with 3 trucks or a logistics director with 300 — we want to hear what you need.
landing.footer_location: Bucharest, Romania · Backed by ASET Romania
landing.waitlist_sub: Launching mid-May to early June. We'll email you when the platform is ready.
landing.waitlist_agree_gdpr_a: I agree to data processing under the
landing.waitlist_agree_gdpr_b: (GDPR), solely to be notified when the platform is ready.
landing.waitlist_success_title: Thank you! You're on the list.
landing.waitlist_success_text: Check your email — we sent you a confirmation. We'll notify you when the platform is ready.
landing.waitlist_already_text: Your email address was already registered. We'll notify you when the platform is ready.

factoring.title: Factoring & early payment
factoring.hero_lead_f: . You get the money instantly, the partner waits to collect from the client.
factoring.status_text: In negotiation with Capital Express, BCR Factoring, and BT Operational Leasing. Sign up on the waitlist — you'll be the first to know when we launch, with preferential terms for early adopters.
factoring.calc_disclaimer: Estimate. Final rate depends on payer scoring.
